confirm.reset_progress: All your progress will be erased. Are you sure?

tutorial.step1_text: Your goal is to remove all arrows from the grid in the correct order.
tutorial.step2_text: An arrow can be removed if the path in the direction it points is clear. If another arrow blocks it, you can't tap it!
tutorial.step3_text: Tap a clear arrow and it slides off the screen like a snake. You earn points!
tutorial.step4_text: Tap a blocked arrow and you lose a life plus 5 seconds. You have 3 lives, be careful!
tutorial.step5_text: Each level has a time limit. Correct moves add +3 seconds. Use your time wisely!
tutorial.step6_text: Finish fast with no mistakes to earn 3 stars! Stars unlock new chapters.

1.name: Egypt
1.title: Ancient Egypt
1.text: In the land of pharaohs, pyramids reach for the sky. Hieroglyphic inscriptions hold mysteries unsolved for millennia. Built on the fertile banks of the Nile, this civilization left humanity's most fascinating structures.
1.mystery: Decode the arrow signs hidden in the secret chambers of the pyramids and find the path to the pharaoh's treasure!

2.name: Greece
2.title: Ancient Greece
2.text: The birthplace of philosophy, democracy, and the Olympics. White marble temples dedicated to the gods, columns reflected in the blue Mediterranean.
2.mystery: Follow the arrow signs hidden among the marble columns of the Parthenon and solve the riddle of the gods!

3.name: Rome
3.title: Roman Empire
3.text: Echoing cheers in the Colosseum, engineering marvels of aqueducts, an empire where all roads led to Rome.
3.mystery: Solve the lost arrow map in the dark corridors of the Colosseum and open the gladiator's path to freedom!

4.name: Vikings
4.title: Viking Age
4.text: Dragon ships sailing from icy fjords, prophecies carved into runic stones. The fearless warriors of the North set sail not just to conquer, but to discover new lands.
4.mystery: Decode the arrow symbols on the runic stones in the correct order and unlock the secret of the Viking treasure map!

5.name: Ottoman
5.title: Ottoman Empire
5.text: A magnificent empire ruling three continents. Mosque domes shine with golden light, the art of illumination turns paper into jewels.
5.mystery: Open the sealed passages in Topkapi Palace courtyard and follow the trail of the lost decree!

6.name: China
6.title: Ancient China
6.text: The Great Wall vanishes into the horizon, the Silk Road connects world civilizations. Dragon legends hide among the clouds.
6.mystery: Solve the dragon map in the forbidden chamber of the Forbidden City and find the emperor's lost seal!

7.name: Maya
7.title: Maya Civilization
7.text: Stone pyramids rising to the sky deep in the jungle, observatories tracking the stars. The Maya calendar was incredibly precise in measuring time.
7.mystery: Solve the arrow symbols on the Maya calendar and unlock the secret of the solar eclipse!

8.name: India
8.title: Ancient India
8.text: The white marble of the Taj Mahal gleams in moonlight, the Ganges carries its sacred waters. Mandala patterns symbolize infinity.
8.mystery: Solve the arrow paths hidden among the lotus patterns in the secret garden of the Taj Mahal!

9.name: Medieval Europe
9.title: Medieval Europe
9.text: In the dark ages, castles rise on misty hilltops, knights' swords gleam in moonlight. Gothic cathedral stained glass tells ancient stories.
9.mystery: Solve the arrow signs in the alchemist's labyrinth-like castle and unlock the formula of the philosopher's stone!

10.name: Final
10.title: Convergence of Civilizations
10.text: The wisdom of all ancient civilizations converges at a single point. Each culture left its piece. Now all pieces must come together.
10.mystery: Unite the arrow signs left by all civilizations and solve humanity's greatest mystery!

appstore.title: Okchu: Arrow Puzzle - Ancient Journey
appstore.subtitle: Arrow Puzzle Game
appstore.description: Explore 10 ancient civilizations, solve 50 challenging puzzles! An epic arrow puzzle adventure spanning from pyramids to castles, pagodas to temples.

modes.title: Game Modes
modes.classic_text: Standard mode: play with a timer and lives. Earn stars and unlock new chapters.
modes.timed_text: Half the time — a challenging mode for quick reflexes.
modes.zen_text: No timer, no lives, no pressure. Just solve the puzzle at your pace.
